generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been following this alliance commitment debate closely, and honestly, I'm glad to see more people waking up to the reality. Our current approach isn't just about national security—it's about everyday fairness. We're carrying more than our share of the burden, and it's time for our allies to step up. Look at the numbers: we're spending disproportionately on collective defense while others lag behind. It's not about being tough or soft on security; it's about making sure everyone pulls their weight. That's just common sense, right? #FairShare #AllianceCommitment
